svg.text: CEO prompts the studio → AI agents ship real code → CEO reviews, fires, and sets direction → loop

g.text: 5 AI agents work in-character · stand-ups, coding, PR review
Solutions Architect · Ari · ADRs, system design
every action produces real Git history
CEO reviews scores and pulls two levers
adds a feature, rewrites agent prompts, re-weights scoring for next sprint

svg.text: PHASE 5 · LOOP RESTART · decisions reshape the next sprint
